properties.entry: DELETE FROM MembershipChange WHERE MembershipChange.individualSegmentId IN (:individualSegmentIds)
UPDATE MembershipChange SET individualDeleted = :individualDeleted WHERE MembershipChange.individualId = :individualId
UPDATE MembershipChange SET individualDeleted = :individualDeleted WHERE MembershipChange.individualId IN (:individualIds)
UPDATE MembershipChange SET individualName = :individualName WHERE MembershipChange.individualId = :individualId
